title: Durability Alerts
description: Customizable durability warnings with sounds and dynamic alerts for Fabric.
body:
![Durability Alerts](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1c5870d94aefc1e7899dcf0a16f6cee261b8080e_0.webp)
# 🛡️ Durability Alerts

**Durability Alerts** is a lightweight and professional client-side mod that displays visual and sound alerts when your tool reaches a specific durability value.

It is designed for Survival, Hardcore, and PvP players who need precision and full control over their tools' durability.

The mod works entirely on the client side, which makes it compatible with any server, including vanilla servers.

---

# ✨ Features

- 🔔 Custom alerts for an exact number of remaining uses
- 🎵 Configurable sounds
- 🖥️ Large title displayed in the center of the screen
- 📌 Additional message compatible with modded clients
- 🎨 Color and formatting support using &
- ⚡ Extremely lightweight and optimized
- 💾 Automatic configuration saving
- ⚙️ Intelligent AutoSwitch system to prevent tools from breaking

---

# ⚙️ How It Works

When you hold a tool in your main hand:

1. The mod detects the remaining durability.
2. If it matches a configured value:

- A **large on-screen message** is displayed
- An **alert sound** is played
- An **additional client-compatible message** is shown

Everything happens automatically. No required setup needed.

---

# 🔧 Smart AutoSwitch

Durability Alerts can automatically help prevent your tools from breaking.

When your tool reaches the **last 5 durability points**, the mod can automatically switch to another tool.

How it works:

- It looks for **the same tool in your hotbar** with more durability.

- If it cannot find one, it switches to a **safe slot**.

- If all tools are almost broken, **no switch will be made**.

This helps prevent accidental tool breakage during long mining sessions.
---

# 🧩 Commands

### 📋 View active alerts
Shows all configured durability alerts.

```
/golpes list
```
---
### ➕ Create a custom alert

```
/golpes create <hits> <sound> <message>
```
Lets you create an alert when the tool reaches a specific number of remaining uses.

Example:

```
/golpes create 75 anvil &c⚠ 75 %dHITS LEFT ⚠
```
---
### ❌ Remove an alert

```
/golpes destroy <hits>
```
Removes the alert configured for that number of remaining uses.

---
### 🔁 Toggle AutoSwitch


```
/golpes autoswitch on/off
```


---

### 🎨 View available colors and formats

```
/golpes colors
```

Shows all colors and formatting codes you can use in messages.

Example color and formatting codes:

```
&c red
&a green
&e yellow
&l bold
&o italic
```
---
### ❓ Quick help

```
/golpes help
```
Shows a quick explanation of all available commands.

---

### 🟢 Status


```
/golpes status
```


Shows the current status of the mod.

---

# 🔊 Available Sounds

```
levelup
anvil
orb
beacon
```

---
